network_summary: Dr. Mohammad Moein Azimi (DDS, UIC College of Dentistry 2018) is the licensed dentist-owner of a private three-location dental group in Chicagoland. He operates under the legal entity 'Align Dental Group Chicago Corp' across two Chicago locations (Taylor St / West Loop and Addison St / Avondale) and under '4 Rivers Dental Ltd' at the Northbrook location. Consumer-facing brands include 'Elston Dental' (3235 W Addison), 'Smart Dental' / 'Willow Festival Dental' (840 Willow Rd Northbrook), and 'Align Dental Group Chicago Corp' itself (1259 W Taylor). No MSO, management company, DSO platform, or PE backer was found. This is a dentist-owned multi-office private group with no separate management/MSO layer.
owner_operator_identity: Dr. Mohammad Moein Azimi, DDS — Doctorate of Dental Medicine, University of Illinois at Chicago College of Dentistry (2018, high honors). Owner-operator across all three locations. Member ADA and Illinois State Dental Society.
durable_artifacts: AO reach=3: MOHAMMAD MOEIN AZIMI appears as authorized official on NPIs 1962197285 (Taylor St), 1346079951 (Addison St), and 1467337964 (Northbrook) across ZIPs 60607, 60618, 60062
smartdentalnow.com features Dr. Moein Azimi as dentist at 840 Willow Rd, Northbrook — same address as 4 Rivers Dental Ltd NPI 1467337964
elstondental.com features Dr. Moein Azimi as dentist/owner at 3235 W Addison St Suite 6, Chicago 60618 — same address as Align Dental Group Chicago Corp NPI 1346079951
aligndentalgroup.com (Florida-based unrelated practice) — NOT the same entity as Align Dental Group Chicago Corp
DentalPlans.com directory lists Dr. Mohammadmoein Z Azimi at both Chicago 60618 and Waukegan 60085 locations
stale_closed_false_positive_notes: 4 Rivers Dental Ltd (NPI 1467337964, provider_count=0, year_established=2010) is the NPPES entity but the consumer-facing practice at 840 Willow Rd now operates as 'Smart Dental' (formerly 'Willow Festival Dental'). The NPPES legal name is stale/legacy but the address is verified active. No location appears closed.
evidence_chain: Federal AO signal: MOHAMMAD MOEIN AZIMI appears as authorized official on 3 NPIs across 3 ZIPs (60062, 60607, 60618). Documentary corroboration: (1) elstondental.com confirms Dr. Moein Azimi as dentist-owner at 3235 W Addison St Suite 6, Chicago 60618 — matching Align Dental Group Chicago Corp NPI 1346079951. (2) smartdentalnow.com confirms Dr. Moein Azimi as dentist at 840 Willow Rd Suite H, Northbrook 60062 — matching 4 Rivers Dental Ltd NPI 1467337964. (3) Yahoo Local and OpenNPI confirm Azimi Mohammad Moein is the provider at 1259 W Taylor St, Chicago 60607 — NPI 1962197285. No MSO/management company/DSO platform/PE backer found across three web searches. Dr. Azimi is the sole licensed dentist-owner operating a private multi-location group under multiple consumer brands.
future_app_notes: Monitor for network expansion — DentalPlans.com snippet referenced '27 other locations' which could not be verified (403 Forbidden). If confirmed, this network may be larger than the 3 watched-IL ZIPs covered by this AO cluster. Additional NPI registrations under Dr. Azimi's credential number should be checked. Watch for any MSO/management company entity that could upgrade tier to branded_dso. The Waukegan location (60085) was referenced in DentalPlans but is not in the current AO cluster — check if a Waukegan NPI is registered under Azimi AO.
